name: Y.M.C.A.背包射手的日常
short_description: Aliens are invading! Load up your guns and eliminate them with the help of ancient indigenous equipment in your backpack!
detailed_description:
Aliens are invading your county, ripping off your hats and ruining your assets! You must get help from heroes in the county, provide them with your gears and pets and cooperate to clean up the aliens.

Use classic characters such as Rump, Mask, Joe, etc., to expel aliens and revive the county!

Game Features

-----------------------------

Many Heroes

·Gradually unlock up to 8 heroes (12 will be added in the official version), wield different weapons, and have noticeable differences in damage, range, and attack frequency, and are good at handling different situations.

Many Components

·With more than 200 components (more to be added in the future), the backpack space is maximized through careful placement, and the combat power is quickly increased through effect matching.

You can also battle against other players

·Try to survive longer than your opponent under tremendous waves of alien invaders to see who can Make County Great Again!!!!!

-----------------------------

When you encounter a Bug in the game, if it is convenient for you, please find the "Player.log" in the root directory of the game, which is a shortcut, open and copy all the text content to us, if you can also add a little text description and pictures of the Bug is better, we will try to repair, thank you for your support!

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
